<!--
Thanks for contributing to SmartLoop!

Before submitting:
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] I've tested locally — `bun run dev` works in apps/api and apps/web
- [ ] I'm not committing any .env files or secrets
- [ ] If I changed schema.ts, I've generated + committed the migration

If this PR closes an issue, link it: `Closes #123`
-->

## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link the issue / discussion if applicable.

## How (optional)

Anything non-obvious about the implementation.

## Testing

Steps you took to verify this works.

## Screenshots / before-after (UI changes)

<!-- Drop screenshots or GIFs here if you touched the dashboard or marketing site -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated (when applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (when applicable)
- [ ] No breaking API changes (or noted in description)
- [ ] No secrets committed
